defaultMissionText: Walk from Washington Square Park to Union Square using the most building shade.
missionExamples: Walk from Washington Square Park to Union Square using the most building shade.
Find a shaded walk from McCarren Park to Cooper Park.
Avoid direct sun between Tompkins Square Park and Union Square.
Take the shadier route from Washington Square Park to Tompkins Square Park.
On this hot day, walk from Cooper Park to McCarren Park with less direct sun.
